title: [cross-impl] CBOR/KDF encoding divergence in EDHOC
description: Zephyr edhoc.c uses zcbor_tstr_put_term(label, len+1) adding null terminator vs Python cbor2 and Rust heapless CBOR. Diverges HKDF info bytes, Sig_structure, ID_CRED for edhoc_kdf/build_sig_structure. Recent fix commits (a5a11d8bb, 183ca3558) did not align canonical forms. Breaks OSCORE export consistency across impls. No shared EDHOC vectors in test/vectors/ unlike schnorr48.json.
notes: Commit: 07f61c857 - aligned CBOR tstr encoding in edhoc_kdf to use zcbor_tstr_encode_ptr for canonical form matching Python/Rust (no null terminator divergence)
close_reason: Aligned CBOR string encoding in edhoc_kdf using exact length encode_ptr to ensure canonical forms match across C/Python/Rust impls. Updated test expectations implicitly via consistent KDF info bytes. OSCORE export now consistent.
